article.title: Ecovacs robot vacuums get major price cuts up to $500 as US tariffs stabilize
article.summary: Ecovacs, a robot vacuum maker that our sister site 9to5Google covers frequently , has just announced that it is enacting “permanent” price cuts to most of its lineup, and they’re not small either. more…
article.title_zh: Ecovacs 機器人吸塵器大幅降價最高 $500，因美國關稅趨於穩定
article.summary_zh: Ecovacs 宣佈對大部分產品線永久降價，最高降幅達 $500。

article.title: Can China Really Block Meta’s Manus AI Acquisition?
article.summary: Artificial intelligence “agents” that can carry out complex tasks with minimal human intervention are attracting heavy investment as giant technology companies look beyond chatbots to develop more autonomous systems.
article.title_zh: 中國真的能阻止Meta收購Manus AI嗎？
article.summary_zh: 能執行複雜任務、需人為干預最少的AI「agent」吸引大量投資，科技巨頭正尋求超越聊天機器人開發更自主的系統。

article.title: Chinese Billionaire Overhauls AI Startup After Warning on Manus
article.summary: The fallout from Meta Platforms Inc.’s controversial acquisition of Manus is prompting one tech founder to erect strict walls between his Chinese and US businesses, calling it a regrettable but necessary template for navigating geopolitical tensions.
article.title_zh: 中國億萬富翁在Manus警告後重組AI創業公司
article.summary_zh: Meta Platforms Inc. 收購 Manus 引發的後續影響，促使一位科技創辦人在中美業務間設立嚴格隔離，稱其為應對地緣政治緊張局勢的必要且遺憾的做法。

article.title: Introducing NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano Omni: Long-Context Multimodal Intelligence for Documents, Audio and Video Agents
article.title_zh: 推出 NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano Omni：適用於文件、音訊和影片代理的長文本多模態智能

article.title: Ubuntu's AI roadmap revealed, universal AI 'kill switch' and forced AI integration are not part of the plan — cloud tracking, local inference, and agentic system tools take center stage
article.summary: Canonical has confirmed AI is coming to Ubuntu, with plans for local AI inference, agentic system tools, and AI-powered accessibility features — says everything will remain opt-in and privacy-focused.
article.title_zh: Ubuntu AI 路線圖揭露，通用 AI「殺死開關」和強制 AI 整合並未納入計劃 — 雲端追蹤、本地推理和智能代理系統工具成為焦點
article.summary_zh: Canonical 確認 AI 將登陸 Ubuntu，計畫包括本地 AI 推理、智能代理系統工具和 AI 支援的無障礙功能，所有功能將保持選擇性和隱私保護。

article.title: The Race Is on to Keep AI Agents From Running Wild With Your Credit Cards
article.summary: AI agents may soon be buying your stuff for you. The FIDO Alliance has teamed up with Google and Mastercard to try to ensure that shopping in the near future isn't a complete disaster.
article.title_zh: 競賽進行中以防止AI代理濫用您的信用卡
article.summary_zh: AI代理可能很快就會為你購物，FIDO聯盟與Google和Mastercard合作，試圖確保近期的購物體驗不會是完全的災難。

article.title: Xiaomi releases open-weight MiMo-V2.5 AI model, claims "frontier-level agentic capability"
article.summary: Xiaomi is the latest company to release an open-weight AI model – MiMo-V2.5 claims to be a “major step forward in agentic capability and multimodal understanding.” Xiaomi has shared various benchmark results that compare MiMo-V2.5 against the likes of the recently released DeepSeek-V4, Kimi K2.6, Claude Opus 4.6, Gemini 3.1 Pro and Xiaomi’s older MiMo-V2-Pro. The company claims that MiMo-V2.5 achieved best-in-class performance on its in-house agentic tasks benchmark. On the internal MiMo Coding Bench, the smaller V2.5 model matched the larger V2.5-Pro at half the cost. In other...
article.title_zh: 小米發布開源 MiMo-V2.5 AI 模型，宣稱具有「前沿級代理能力」
article.summary_zh: 小米發布開源 AI 模型 MiMo-V2.5，聲稱在代理能力和多模態理解方面實現「重大進步」。小米分享的基準測試結果將 MiMo-V2.5 與最近發布的 DeepSeek-V4、Kimi K2.6 等進行了比較。

article.title: SAS opens its analytics engine to Claude, Copilot and any AI agent with Viya MCP Server
article.summary: SAS has spent 50 years building analytics and decisioning software for regulated industries like banks, insurers, government agencies, and manufacturers. Now, it is betting that governance will be its moat in the agent era. As AI agents reshape how enterprise software is consumed, the company’s deep domain expertise and governance might be the assets that hold their value, regardless of which model or agent architecture wins in this AI era. As SAS CTO Bryan Harris noted in his keynote at SAS’ Innovate ’26 conference in Grapevine, Texas, on Tuesday: “We empower people with technology to scale human observation and decision making. Since the beginning, SAS has been pioneering technological breakthroughs to help you close the information gap and gain a competitive adva
article.title_zh: SAS透過Viya MCP Server向Claude、Copilot及任何AI代理開放其分析引擎
article.summary_zh: SAS花費50年為銀行、保險公司等受管制產業構建分析和決策軟體，現在押注治理將成為其在代理時代的護城河。

article.title: How HPE is closing the loop on cloud and AI sprawl with agentic AI
article.summary: Nothing is Greenfield in an enterprise. Hybrid cloud complexity sits atop siloed teams and systems, making it nearly impossible to observe, understand, remediate, and prevent outages. Understaffed operations and site reliability teams now also have to keep pace with AI. All while the enterprise stack faces more risks of instability and insecurity than ever. To respond, enterprise operations must fundamentally change how they approach Day 2 and beyond. No longer is it safer to maintain thick boundaries between services or divisions — they block return on AI investment anyway. To survive, organizations must move from siloed, reactive dashboards to a closed-loop operations model, supported by AI agents, treating orchestration, observability, and remediation as a continuous feedback cycl
article.title_zh: HPE 如何透過 agentic AI 解決雲端和 AI 蔓延問題
article.summary_zh: 企業面臨混合雲複雜性、孤立團隊與系統的挑戰，HPE 透過 agentic AI 幫助企業觀察、理解、修復和預防中斷。

article.title: Nvidia釋出鎖定AI代理人的多模態模型Nemotron 3 Nano Omni
article.summary: Nvidia週二（4/28）發布Nemotron 3 Nano Omni，這是一款鎖定AI代理人（AI Agent）設計的多模態模型，可在單一模型中同時處理影片、音訊、圖片與文字，在維持相同互動品質的條件下，處理效率最高可達同類開源模型的9倍。
article.title_zh: Nvidia釋出鎖定AI代理人的多模態模型Nemotron 3 Nano Omni
article.summary_zh: Nvidia發布Nemotron 3 Nano Omni多模態模型，可同時處理影片、音訊、圖片與文字，處理效率最高可達同類開源模型的9倍。

article.title: Inside Google's TPU V8 strategy, delivering two chips for two crucial tasks at incredible scale — network scales up to 1 million TPUs per cluster, an advantage over Nvidia AI accelerators
article.summary: Google announced its eighth-gen TPUs at Cloud Next, shipping two distinct chip designs for the first time in the TPU program's decade-long history.
article.title_zh: 深入瞭解 Google TPU V8 策略，以超大規模交付兩款針對性晶片 — 網路規模達每叢集 100 萬個 TPU，相比 Nvidia AI 加速器優勢明顯
article.summary_zh: Google 在 Cloud Next 發佈第八代 TPU，首次在 TPU 計畫十年歷史中推出兩款不同晶片設計。

article.title: Samsung might finally redesign Galaxy S phones, unless RAMageddon ruins it
article.summary: According to a leaker, Samsung might be working on a redesign for its Galaxy S smartphones, but there’s a huge asterisk that might put us in the same situation as the Galaxy S26 series was left in. more…
article.title_zh: Samsung可能重新設計Galaxy S手機，除非RAMageddon破壞計畫
article.summary_zh: 據洩露者報告，Samsung可能在開發Galaxy S系列重設計，但存在可能導致Galaxy S26系列同樣局面的隱憂。

article.title: Two more Android phones just added AirDrop over Quick Share support
article.summary: Following an expansion from Pixel to Samsung Galaxy, Google’s support for AirDrop over Quick Share is now showing up on more Android phones, starting with two models from Oppo and Vivo. more…
article.title_zh: 又有兩款Android手機加入支援AirDrop的Quick Share功能
article.summary_zh: 繼Pixel和Samsung Galaxy擴展後，Google AirDrop over Quick Share支援現已出現在Oppo和Vivo的手機上。
